title: Mouthwatering Nutty Ethiopian Macaroni Shiro
description: A nutty and chewy Ethiopian dish featuring macaroni, this shiro is a low-calorie-friendly meal prep option. It combines the flavors of Ethiopia with the comfort of macaroni.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the macaroni according to package instructions.
Reserve 1 cup of pasta water before draining the macaroni.
In a large skillet, saute the chopped onion, minced garlic, and grated ginger over medium heat.
Add the berbere spice and nutmeg to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
In a blender or food processor, combine the cooked onion mixture, pasta water, and chickpea flour, and blend until smooth.
Return the skillet to medium heat and add the blended mixture, stirring constantly.
Add the cooked macaroni to the skillet and stir to combine with the shiro sauce.
Stir in the chopped walnuts and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Season with salt to taste and serve hot.
